inputs.name: colGrow
inputs.description: Weather the column should take all available width

inputs.name: colLg
inputs.description: Defines the width of the element on the layout grid for large screen devices.

inputs.name: colMd
inputs.description: Defines the width of the element on the layout grid for middle-size screen devices.

inputs.name: colOffset
inputs.description: Defines the offset width of the element on the layout grid.

inputs.name: colOffsetLg
inputs.description: Defines the offset width of the element on the layout grid for large screen devices.

inputs.name: colOffsetMd
inputs.description: Defines the offset width of the element on the layout grid for middle-sized screen devices.

inputs.name: colOffsetXl
inputs.description: Defines the offset width of the element on the layout grid for extra-large screen devices.

inputs.name: colXl
inputs.description: Defines the width of the element on the layout grid for extra-large screen devices.

inputs.name: fdLayoutGridCol
inputs.description: Defines the width of the element on the layout grid.
